species: Actinins are strain-sensing actin cross-linkers that are ubiquitously expressed and harbor mutations in human diseases.
tissue: We utilize CRISPR, pluripotent stem cells, and BioID to study actinin interactomes in human cardiomyocytes.
cell_type: We utilize CRISPR, pluripotent stem cells, and BioID to study actinin interactomes in human cardiomyocytes.
sample_source: we utilized a cardiac microtissue (CMT) assay previously applied to study sarcomere mutations that cause heart failure.
cell_line: PGP1 iPSCs (Coriell #GM23338) were used for all studies...
